lastStrategyDecision.reason: Evidence is still not strong enough to justify automated long entries. MarketCondition is neutral, averageRelativeVolume 1.05 is only marginally above baseline (limited momentum/participation edge), averageGapPercent is slightly negative (-0.27%) which reduces clean continuation setups, averageLiquidityScore 52.79 is only moderate (slippage/stop reliability risk), and averageCatalystScore 23.95 is weak (lower follow-through probability). While uptrendShare is improved at 0.60 and data is fully fresh (20/20), the overall quality remains low-conviction for execution. Maintain a conservative long-only pullback-to-VWAP plan with bracket exits for auditability, but keep plannedTradesToday at 0 and observe until liquidity/catalyst and participation improve. Paper active exploration is enabled: live market data is fresh and the setup quality is acceptable, so the desk may take small paper trades while risk gates remain active.
